attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.CONTACT_POINT_ID, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.CONTACT_POINT_TYPE, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.STATUS, 
STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.OWNER_TABLE_NAME, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.OWNER_TABLE_ID, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.CREATED_BY,

STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.ATTRIBUTE4,

STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.ATTRIBUTE13, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.ATTRIBUTE16, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.ATTRIBUTE17, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.ATTRIBUTE18, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.ATTRIBUTE19, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.ATTRIBUTE20, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1,
STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13,
STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.EDI_TRANSACTION_HANDLING, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.EDI_ID_NUMBER, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.EDI_PAYMENT_METHOD, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.EDI_PAYMENT_FORMAT, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.EDI_REMITTANCE_METHOD,
STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.EDI_REMITTANCE_INSTRUCTION, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.EDI_TP_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.EDI_ECE_TP_LOCATION_CODE,
STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.EMAIL_FORMAT, TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.EMAIL_ADDRESS USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) EMAIL_ADDRESS,
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.BEST_TIME_TO_CONTACT_START, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.BEST_TIME_TO_CONTACT_END, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.PHONE_CALLING_CALENDAR, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.CONTACT_ATTEMPTS, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.CONTACTS, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.DECLARED_BUSINESS_PHONE_FLAG, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.DO_NOT_USE_FLAG, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.DO_NOT_USE_REASON, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.LAST_CONTACT_DT_TIME, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.PHONE_PREFERRED_ORDER, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.PRIORITY_OF_USE_CODE, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.TELEPHONE_TYPE, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.TIME_ZONE, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.PHONE_TOUCH_TONE_TYPE_FLAG, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.PHONE_AREA_CODE, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.PHONE_COUNTRY_CODE,
 TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.PHONE_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) PHONE_NUMBER,
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.PHONE_EXTENSION, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.PHONE_LINE_TYPE, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.TELEX_NUMBER, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.WEB_TYPE, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.URL,
 TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.RAW_PHONE_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) RAW_PHONE_NUMBER, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.CREATED_BY_MODULE, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.APPLICATION_ID, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.TIMEZONE_ID, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.CONTACT_POINT_PURPOSE, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.PRIMARY_BY_PURPOSE, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.TRANSPOSED_PHONE_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) TRANSPOSED_PHONE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.EFT_TRANSMISSION_PROGRAM_ID, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.EFT_PRINTING_PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.EFT_USER_NUMBER, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.EFT_SWIFT_CODE, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, 
 STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS,
(
select CONTACT_POINT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS
minus
select CONTACT_POINT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.CONTACT_POINT_ID = STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.CONTACT_POINT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_HZ_CONTACT_POINTS.REFRESH_DATETIME
